feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP on Oracle RAC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

we want to implement an SAP system on Oracle RAC with ASM on standard VMs, we have two questions.
1)In SAP note DIGITS it is reported that the Oracle RDBMS Home must be a shared file system. In our opinion this leads several limitations, including for example the impossibility of performing DB rolling Upgrades and Patches. 

Is this limitation still valid or we can implement local Oracle RDBMS Home for each node of the Oracle RAC Cluster? We are asking you because the SAP note DIGITS is not updated since DIGITS.

For "Oracle Engineered Systems" solutions this limitation does not seem to apply.

Is there any way to perform patches in rolling mode for the RDBMS Home on Oracle RAC for SAP?

2)In a RAC implementation the grid infrastructure software should be installed manually following Oracle Guides or using SAP tools or scripts provided by SAP? 

Thank you and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and DF-e Technical Note 2024.001
entry.content:
Customer would like to know when SAP intends to provide more technical details about Brazil Tax Reform. According to the customer, Brazil Government has issued Technical Notes and customer needs to understand the impacts in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Material 300006880: No method for batch determination assigned for Mvmt Type 261
entry.content: Hi i have checked all configuration and the material managament setup on mm03 but i keep getting this error on this specific material can you explain what can cause this

entry.title: distribute the ratio of free goods value from billing to on return order at main item
entry.content:
how to distribute the ratio of free goods value item from the billing which act as reference document to make return order for the main item

In case of Following offer:

Piece Price = 1200 YER

Offer: Each 24 PC Qty 2 Free Goods

Each 12 Pc Qty 1 Free Good

For 10 Pc and less Calculate its Percentage from Piece Price  

For Return with 10 Pc takes back amount 1000 YER

For Return with 9 PC takes Back Amount 900 YER

Which means all fractions from Pc Qty take their percentage from Pc Price

entry.title: Putaway Strategy Configuration
entry.content:
For a particular Material, we need to assign 5 Storage bins.

When we create a Transfer order after the Good receipt process; the system should automatically suggest the first Bin.

And if the first bin is full, system should automatically suggest the next bin based on the bin capacity. Error should be generated if we try any other bins other than the assigned ones (5 bins).

Is this possible in SAP WM? Or EWM? What all configurations are required for this requirement?

entry.title: Difference in Real Stock vs Valuated Stock
entry.content:
Hello,

My client has an issue for a material where the current stock is 0 Kg (MD04); nevertheless, through MB5B there is a valuated stock of 9 Kg.

In the material master record : 

  • Under the Accounting 1 view, the field Total Stock has 9 Kg
  • Under the Plant stock view, all fields are set to 0 Kg
  • Material only defined for 1 division

In addition, during 2022 there were 2 goods receipt for this material through 107/109 : 

BatchMvmtQty in Unit of EntryQty in SKUQty OrderedQuantity Received
Batch1107322322300318
Batch1109318318300318
Batch2107316316300311
Batch2109311311300311

As you can see there are some differences in the quantities (in total 9 Kg) and for the business this difference was stock in transit but through MB5T no stock in transit is found.

Thanks in advance for your replies.

Best,

entry.title: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content:
Hello!
I have an issue with inspection lot numbers.
We changed number range status "10000070900" for number range No. "01" via QA09 t-code.
The screenshot is available on the attachments. ("QA09 current.png")
After changing the number range status I tried to create some inspection lots.
You can see inspection lots' images, too. ("Inspection lots.png")
So, the inspections' numbers didn't occur as expected. Also, number range status didn't change after creating inspection lots.
I would want to mention that, I changed it 2 times. Unfortunately, the number range status doesn't perceive the latest version and don't change automatically.

We hope somebody had the same issue.
I look forward your solving ideas for this problem.

Thanks for attention.
Kindly regards.

entry.title: PO Modification only print the line changed in the pdf embeded in modification email
entry.content:
Hi
We are trying to reove message sending on delivery completed for POs.

We first went to SPRO : Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Fields relevant to printouts of changes and deselect PO column

We then had to come to SPRO and add
Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Output Control > Message type > define message type for purchase order > Maintain Message Types for PO
We have set Program to FM06AEND and FORM routine to CHANGE_FLAG.

 

It seems to wok but now when we change a line (material) in the PO, instead of receiving the whole new PO attached as PDF, the PDF only contains the line changed.

Do you know where this could come from ? Or do you know what is the abap program called to generate the PO PDF ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Maintenance Technicians as Workcenters
entry.content:
I have a situation where I don't have access to HR module, for maintenance technicians. I need to make departments and personnel responsible for maintenance plans and schedules and to be notified.

The work around I was given was to create workcenters as maintenance technicians... assign them as the "Maint Workcenter" I don't feel I can log multiple technicians on one job, and I can't have any metrics or time logging.

Is there a way I can have KPIs and any other metrics without using HR module, what will I not be able to do with out personnel resources for my PMs and WOs scheduling.

entry.title: Installation guide for ORacle RAC 19c on AIX 7.2
entry.content:
What is the installation steps for Oracle RAC 19c on Cluster or HA.

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "Executing a Batch Input Session --> Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem: I created a recording of my report using the SHDB transaction. Based on this, I created a report that, simply put, saves the corresponding records when changes are made (e.g., the description is changed), clicks the back button, and processes the next record that was entered in the selection screen.

Now, the report works quite well, but when the first record is processed and it moves to the next record by clicking the back button, I receive the error: "Error: 'LEAVE TO TRANSACTION' is not allowed in Batch Input." I have tried many things, but nothing has brought the desired success. My goal is to be able to run the report, which creates a batch input session, in the background. Unfortunately, this is currently failing.

Here is the code of my report:

REPORT z_autosave.

TABLES: /opl09/anl_sts, /opl09/fa_vorrat.

CONSTANTS: lc_transaction TYPE tstc-tcode VALUE '/OPL09/INVENTUR'.

DATA: BEGIN OF bdcdata OCCURS 1000.
        INCLUDE STRUCTURE bdcdata.
DATA: END OF bdcdata.
DATA: ls_bdcdata TYPE bdcdata.

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_melnr FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-melnr,
                s_satza FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-satza,
                s_datum FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-datum,
                s_bukrs FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-bukrs OBLIGATORY,
                s_anln1 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln1,
                s_anln2 FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-anln2,
                s_icon FOR /opl09/fa_vorrat-icon OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '@09@',   "@08@ = green, @ = yellow, @0A@ = red
                s_frgsts FOR /opl09/anl_sts-frg_sts OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'NRE'. "NRE = not relevant (for workflow)

PARAMETERS: p_group TYPE apqi-groupid DEFAULT 'OPAL_AUTO'.




START-OF-SELECTION.

  AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'F_BKPF_BUK'
    ID 'BUKRS' DUMMY "FIELD p_bukrs    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
    ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    MESSAGE e112(fg). "WITH p_bukrs.    <----- TO BE CHANGED LATER
  ENDIF.

  SELECT v~melnr, v~anln1, v~anln2 FROM /opl09/fa_vorrat AS v JOIN /opl09/anl_sts AS s
    ON v~melnr = s~melnr
    AND s~frg_step IS INITIAL
    AND s~frg_def IS INITIAL

    WHERE v~melnr IN @s_melnr
    AND v~satza IN @s_satza
    AND v~datum IN @s_datum
    AND v~bukrs IN @s_bukrs
    AND v~anln1 IN @s_anln1
    AND v~anln2 IN @s_anln2
    AND v~icon IN @s_icon
    AND s~frg_sts IN @s_frgsts

    INTO TABLE (lt_items).

  DATA: lv_count TYPE i VALUE 0.


** Öffnen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_OPEN_GROUP'
    EXPORTING
      client = sy-mandt
      group  = p_group
      user   = sy-uname
      keep   = 'X'.

  LOOP AT lt_items ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>).

    " Zähler erhöhen
    lv_count = lv_count + 1.

    "Choose Process work list on main screen
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_INVENTUR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                     '=ARBVO'.

    " fill selection screen for process work list
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '1000'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'S_MELNR-LOW'
                                     <fs_item>-melnr.      " Registration number
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.

    " click on save
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN1' <fs_item>-anln1.
*    PERFORM bdc_field  USING 'S_ANLN2' <fs_item>-anln2.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=SAVE'.

    " confirm popup
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_SUBSCR'
                                     'SAPLSPO1                                0501SUBSCREEN'.

*    " Additional pop-up confirmations can be added here
*    " Example for another pop-up
*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLSPO1' '0500'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=YES'.

*    PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING '/OPL09/FA_ANLAGEN_ARBVOR' '0100'.
*    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
*                                     '=/EBACK'.







    CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_INSERT'
      EXPORTING
        tcode     = lc_transaction
      TABLES
        dynprotab = bdcdata.

    CLEAR bdcdata[].

  ENDLOOP.



** Schließen der Arbeitsmappe
  CALL FUNCTION 'BDC_CLOSE_GROUP'
    EXCEPTIONS
      not_open    = 1
      queue_error = 2
      OTHERS      = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'closing batch input session failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR bdcdata[].

  " Ausgabe der Anzahl der verarbeiteten Datensätze
  WRITE: / 'Number of processed records:', lv_count.
  WRITE: / 'Batch input session successfully created.'.


*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*                              FORMS                                 *
*                              -----                                 *
*--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_DYNPRO                                                    *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  program = Programmanme des Dynpro                            *
*&  -->  dynpro  = Dynpronummer                                       *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_dynpro USING program dynpro.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-program  = program.
  ls_bdcdata-dynpro   = dynpro.
  ls_bdcdata-dynbegin = 'X'.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.                    "bdc_dynpro
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form BDC_FIELD                                                     *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Hilfsroutine zum Anlegen der Dynprobefehle                         *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&  -->  fnam = Feldname                                              *
*&  -->  fval = Feldwert                                              *
*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM bdc_field USING fnam fval.

  CLEAR ls_bdcdata.
  ls_bdcdata-fnam     = fnam.
  ls_bdcdata-fval     = fval.
  APPEND ls_bdcdata TO bdcdata.

ENDFORM.

 

Here is the recording of my report.



I would really appreciate your help, as I am getting a bit frustrated.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: E-Invoice Malaysia: Cancelled invoice in LHDN portal.
entry.content:
Hi,

In regards to getting the updated status in EDOC_COCKPIT, I want to know if an invoice is cancelled in the LHDN portal, can we get the status updated in the cockpit. 

So far, I do not see this happening even though technically speaking it could be a possibility with "Get Status" functionality.

Any answers or insights on this are appreciated.

entry.title: Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

Im using Fiory My inbox to approuve PR but the details for the items are not showing bellow "Screenshot bellow"

Im using PR overall release 

SAP Vesrion 

 

The services of the App ID  :  F0401A  has been added by the baisis by still have issue (SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)) and as shown in fiori libray, the item can be displayed 

 Could you please help

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Free of charge invoices with Mexican SAT
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus

Is it possible to send zero value e-invoices to Mexican SAT ?

 

Adam

entry.title: Install S4HANA 2023 - Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I has issue when installed S4HANA 2023 and HANA Database in one host.

Kindly please your advice.

Detail issue on below, and please find the attachment.

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

R3trans -d
This is R3trans version 6.27 (release 793 - 12.06.24 - 09:07:06).
unicode enabled version
R3trans finished (0000).

entry.title: When calling the standard API, it says' the sequence does not contain any matching elements'
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I need to create a sales order by calling an interface from an external system, When calling the standard API 'API_SALES_ORDER_SRV', it says' the sequence does not contain any matching elements', any behavior that calls this API will result in the same error. But after about 30 minutes, when using the same data call, there will be no more errors.

In addition, for a long time before, the problem occurred between 4:30 pm and 5:00 pm every day, but now the problem occurs between 9:30 am and 10:00 am.
I am eager to know how to solve or troubleshoot the problem. Please respond to any helpful ideas or methods. Thank you very much!

Thanks and Regards!

entry.title: Incorrect System Number in SMP
entry.content: Incorrect System Number in SMP, need to correct SAP System number

entry.title: Its Possible set handler with Dinamic object
entry.content:
how to define set handle, with a dinamic object "Type REF Object"?

CLASS cl_report DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor,
             select,
             display,
             coluna_clicada.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_data,
            valor TYPE i,
            link_click TYPE char30,
          END OF ty_data.
    DATA: lt_data TYPE TABLE OF ty_data.
    DATA: o_control TYPE REF TO object.
    "FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_control> TYPE REF TO object.
ENDCLASS.                    "cl_report DEFINITION

CLASS cl_control DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor,
      init,
      handler FOR EVENT link_click OF cl_salv_events_table,
      teste_act.
    DATA: lv_is_ref TYPE c LENGTH 1.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: o_report TYPE REF TO cl_report.

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_control DEFINITION

CLASS cl_report IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    DATA: lv_ref_control TYPE string,
          lv_typ_control TYPE string.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO cl_control.
    DATA: o_object TYPE REF TO data.

    CONCATENATE '(' sy-repid ')O_CNTR' INTO lv_ref_control.
    ASSIGN (lv_ref_control) TO <fs_object_control>.

*    CONCATENATE `\PROGRAM=` sy-repid `\CLASS=` 'CL_CONTROL' INTO lv_typ_control.
*    GET REFERENCE OF (lv_ref_control) INTO o_control.
    o_control = <fs_object_control>.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "constructor

  METHOD select.
*    SELECT *
*      FROM mara
*      INTO TABLE me->lt_mara.
*    me->lt_mara
    DATA: ls_mara TYPE ty_data.

    ls_mara-valor = 1.
    ls_mara-link_click = 'Clique aqui'.
    APPEND ls_mara TO lt_data.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "select


  METHOD display.
    DATA: lo_alv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
    TRY.
        cl_salv_table=>factory(
          IMPORTING
            r_salv_table = lo_alv
          CHANGING
            t_table      = me->lt_data ).

      CATCH cx_salv_msg.
    ENDTRY.

    IF lo_alv IS BOUND.
*     DEFININ EVENTS
      DATA: o_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.

      DATA: o_columns TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns,
            o_column  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
      DATA: lv_ref_control TYPE string.
      FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO cl_control.

      o_events = lo_alv->get_event( ).

      o_columns = lo_alv->get_columns( ).
      o_column ?= o_columns->get_column( 'LINK_CLICK' ).
      o_column->set_cell_type( if_salv_c_cell_type=>hotspot ).

      CONCATENATE '(' sy-repid ')O_CNTR' INTO lv_ref_control.
      ASSIGN (lv_ref_control) TO <fs_object_control>.
*      ASSIGN ('me->O_CONTROL') to <fs_object_control>..
*      IF <fs_object_control> is ASSIGNED.
*      SET HANDLER <fs_object_control>->handler FOR o_events.
*      SET HANDLER O_CONTROL->HANDLER FOR o_events.
*        SET HANDLER: o_object->('HANDLER') FOR o_events.
        SET HANDLER <fs_object_control>->HANDLER for o_events.
*        CALL METHOD o_object->('HANDLER') for o_events.
*        SET HANDLER O_CONTROL->('handler') FOR ALL INSTANCES.
*        call method O_CONTROL->('TESTE_ACT').
*      ENDIF.

*      FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_object_control> TYPE REF TO object.


      lo_alv->display( ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "display

  METHOD coluna_clicada.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "coluna_clicada

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_report IMPLEMENTATION

CLASS cl_control IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    CREATE OBJECT o_report.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "constructor

  METHOD init.
    o_report->select( ).
    o_report->display( ).
  ENDMETHOD.                    "init

  METHOD handler.
    BREAK-POINT.
    o_report->coluna_clicada( ).
  ENDMETHOD.                    "handler

  METHOD teste_act.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "teste_act

ENDCLASS.                    "cl_control IMPLEMENTATION

INITIALIZATION.
  DATA: o_cntr TYPE REF TO cl_control.
  CREATE OBJECT o_cntr.
  o_cntr->lv_is_ref = 'X'.
  o_cntr->init( ).

entry.title: SAP PI/PO migration from any-DB (MS SQL server) to HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are planning to migrate from ECC (EHP8) application to S/4 HANA. And we have SAP PI/PO system integrated with ECC. So we are in doubt whether to migrate our SAP PI/PO application from MS SQL Server database to HANA database. As far as I know, unlike ECC or BW, we don't have huge demand for transactions or reports which are usually time-consuming or data-intensive in PI/PO. All PI objects are always in the runtime cache. In production environments, we archive messages frequently. So if we migrate PI/PO database from any DB (MS SQL DB) to HANA DB I don't think it will make much difference. So can anyone please suggest our ideas.

Thanks,

Praveen

entry.title: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp records are available based on a condition
entry.content:
We are looking to stop billing document creation for a delivery after checking VBRK-NETWR and VBRP-NETWR (so we need XVBRK, XVBRP and XKOMV internal tables to be populated for our requirement), if condition is not satisfied stop billing doc creation in VF06 / VF04 / VF01.

We tried couple of user exits but nothing was helpful to stop the billing document creation.

Could you please recommend a condition/setting to stop the billing document creation if condition is not met  and which user exit would be  an appropriate place to handle it ?
